name: c5b6263a-e0c7-4e58-a027-d2b8ac5907e0
goal: Help Rogers customers reach the correct Technical Support path by identifying caller, determining their product, clarifying support intent, and routing to the correct support area.

inputParameterDefinitions.name: customerIdentified
inputParameterDefinitions.description: used to check the caller is identified or not

inputParameterDefinitions.name: savedIntent
inputParameterDefinitions.description: support intent for routing the caller specific product support

inputParameterDefinitions.name: heardBackOffMenu
inputParameterDefinitions.description: this is for checking bomm menu is already accessed or not

outputParameterDefinitions.name: serviceCategoryMixLength
outputParameterDefinitions.description: the length of the serviceCategoryMix will ge calculated and stored here by default it is 0

outputParameterDefinitions.name: enableBOMM
outputParameterDefinitions.description: flag to check if bomm is called

steps.text: Call the `get_service_category_mix_length` action and set the return value to $serviceCategoryMixLength
